fields.description: The workbook (BOQs) this color belongs to. Denormalized (mirrors BoQ Cell Pricing) so the layer is filterable by BoQ.
fields.label: BoQ

fields.description: The committed sheet name, stored VERBATIM (#152 -- never stripped/trimmed). Part of the durable Excel-address identity (survives a re-commit).
fields.label: Sheet Name

fields.description: The source Excel row number of the colored cell (= BOQ Nodes.source_row_number = the committed grid row_number). Durable identity component.
fields.label: Excel Row

fields.description: The Excel column letter of the colored cell (e.g. 'E'). Durable identity component (a color is PER-CELL; a whole-row apply is N records).
fields.label: Column Letter

fields.description: The committed-tier commit_version of the sheet this color annotates. Annotation is anchored to a committed version; identity component.
fields.label: Committed Version

fields.description: A copy of the committed row's description at color time -- a copy-forward MATCH GUARD (a future copy-forward slice warns when the committed description changed under a color). NOT part of the unique key; never branched on.
fields.label: Description (guard)

fields.description: The background-fill tag. A STABLE STRING TOKEN (NOT hex -- the frontend maps token -> swatch). One of exactly 8 values.
fields.label: Color
fields.options:
red
orange
yellow
green
blue
purple
pink
grey

fields.description: Per-(boq, sheet_name, excel_row, col_letter, committed_version) color version. Incremented on re-save by the write path (freeze-and-supersede, mirroring the pricing tier).
fields.label: Color Version

fields.description: Exactly one current color record per (boq, sheet_name, excel_row, col_letter, committed_version). The one-current invariant is enforced by the write path (pricing.py save_cell_color), NOT in this controller (mirrors the pricing-tier convention).
fields.label: Is Current

fields.description: When this color record was written. Set by the write path.
fields.label: Colored At
